text:
(14) Payment instructions:
(a) Payment into escrow account of the issuer.
(b) Payment instructions for Application Supported by Blocked Amount.
sentence_window:
(c) Bidders’ bank account details. (d) Bids by non-resident Indians or foreign portfolio investors, foreign
venture capital investors on repatriation basis (14) Payment instructions:
(a) Payment into escrow account of the issuer.
(b) Payment instructions for Application Supported by Blocked Amount. (15) Submission of bid form. (16) Other instructions:
(a) Joint bids in the case of individuals.
